data.title: Crypto firm ETHZilla sells crypto to kickstart tokenization venture, acquires two jet engines leased to US airline.
data.description: A cryptocurrency treasury company, ETHZilla, made headlines after selling a portion of its digital assets to kickstart a tokenization initiative. The firm bought two jet engines that are currently leased to a major US airline as part of this push. This move signifies a shift in focus for ETHZilla, as they diversify their portfolio by investing in tangible assets. The company's decision to sell cryptocurrencies for this investment highlights their commitment to exploring new avenues in the crypto space.

data.title: Norsk Hydro's 2025 Annual Report: Focus on resilience in a challenging year with measures to reach 2030 goals.
data.description: In the year 2025, global instability persisted with heightened geopolitical tensions. Despite the challenges, Hydro's strategic approach, including geographical diversification and an integrated value chain, bolstered resilience. To effectively address these obstacles, throughout 2025, Hydro proactively implemented strategies to enhance agility and propel growth. These efforts were aimed at achieving the company's strategic objectives set for 2030.

data.title: Announcement on Restricted Share Unit Plan with vested awards and total voting rights disclosed.
data.description: In a recent update, it was reported that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%, which is the lowest it has been in the past five years. The economy added a total of 250,000 new jobs last month, surpassing the expectations of economists. Additionally, the stock market experienced a significant surge, with the main index closing at an all-time high of 35,000 points. This positive economic growth is being attributed to increased consumer spending and a boost in manufacturing activities. Experts predict that this trend is likely to continue in the coming months, indicating a strong recovery for the economy.
AKVA group ASA released its Q4 2025 financial report showcasing notable growth and revenue figures.

data.title: Kalmar's financial review 2025 shows record order intake and sales growth in Q4, released Feb 13, 2026.
data.description: On February 13, 2026, at 9:00 AM (EET), Kalmar Corporation released its financial statements for January-December 2025. The company reported a strong performance throughout the year, marked by record order intake and substantial sales growth in the fourth quarter. This positive trend indicates a successful year with notable achievements for Kalmar.

data.title: Sumitomo Forestry and Tri Pointe Homes merge to expand US housing options, boost growth and provide affordable homes.
data.description: Advocates for the increase in affordable housing in the United States, aiming to boost Tri Pointe Homes' homebuilding operations. This move is expected to enhance their quality offerings and diversify housing choices for American homebuyers.

data.title: Enlight Research raises EfTEN Real Estate Fund AS fair value to 22.69 euros, 15% above last closing price on Tallinn Stock Exchange.
data.description: Enlight Research has revised the equity research and price target for EfTEN Real Estate Fund AS (EfTEN; EFT1T) shares, setting the fair value at 22.69 euros in the base scenario. This indicates a nearly 15% increase from the recent closing price of the stock on the Tallinn Stock Exchange.

data.title: Novartis' Phase III ALIGN study shows Vanrafia slows kidney function decline in IgA nephropathy patients, with a 2.39 ml/min/1.73m² difference in eGFR change from baseline vs. placebo at Week 136. Supportive care has not slowed disease progression, emphasizing the need for targeted therapies for IgAN. Novartis aims to empower breakthroughs in kidney health. 340 patients with IgAN were enrolled in the study, with a primary efficacy endpoint being the change in proteinuria. Novartis is committed to transforming care in kidney health. 24-hour urine protein-to-creatinine ratio was used to measure change in proteinuria. Novartis aims to protect kidney health and delay or prevent dialysis and transplantation.
data.description: Novartis has released final results from the Phase III ALIGN study, showing a slowing decline in kidney function in adults with IgA nephropathy (IgAN) treated with Vanrafia (atrasentan). The study demonstrated a difference of 2.39 ml/min/1.73m2 in estimated glomerular filtration rate (eGFR) change from baseline compared to placebo at Week 136, with a p-value of 0.057. Clinically meaningful results were also seen at Week 132, with a difference of 2.59 ml/min/1.73m2 compared to placebo (p = 0.039). IgAN affects about 25 per million people annually and can lead to kidney failure within 10 to 20 years of diagnosis. Vanrafia is a selective endothelin A (ETA) receptor antagonist, offering potential as a foundational therapy for IgAN. The ALIGN study involved 340 patients over 132 weeks. Novartis aims to target underlying causes of kidney diseases like IgAN to improve patient outcomes and reduce the need for dialysis or transplantation.

data.title: Norsk Hydro proposes NOK 3.0 dividend/share for 2025. Board suggests to General Meeting.
data.description: The Board of Directors at Norsk Hydro ASA have recommended a dividend of NOK 3.0 per share for the financial year 2025. This proposal is set to be presented for approval at the upcoming General Meeting.
January 2026 saw Coop Pank AS reveal its financial outcomes with promising numbers.

data.title: Sika to acquire Akkim, making a significant move towards global expansion in adhesives and sealants.
data.description: Sika announces the acquisition of Akkim, a significant move in their strategy to enhance global presence in adhesives and sealants. This acquisition, valued at a substantial amount, represents a significant step forward in Sika's mission to expand globally in the industry.

data.title: DNO ASA announces shares traded ex-dividend from February 13, 2026 in Norway.
data.description: In Oslo on February 13, 2026, DNO ASA, a prominent Norwegian oil and gas operator, informed that the Company's shares will start trading ex-dividend from the same day.

data.title: Norsk Hydro Q4 2025: NOK 5,587M adjusted EBITDA, NOK 4.6B free cash flow, 10.2% RoaCE; lower alumina prices and stronger NOK affecting results.
data.description: In the fourth quarter of 2025, Hydro's adjusted EBITDA was NOK 5,587 million, a decrease from NOK 7,701 million recorded in the corresponding period of the previous year. The decline in results was attributed to reduced alumina prices and a stronger NOK. However, this was mitigated to some extent by increased primary and alumina volumes, along with decreased raw material expenses. Hydro's free cash flow stood at NOK 4.6 billion, and the twelve-month adjusted Return on Average Capital Employed (RoaCE) concluded at 10.2 percent.

data.title: A Crypto Super PAC allocates $1.5M to defeat Al Green in Texas primary vs. Christian Menefee; Texas among the early voting states.
data.description: Next month, Al Green will be facing off against Christian Menefee in the Democratic Party primary elections. The state of Texas is among the first states to hold primary elections.
